items.headline: Road closures, forecast and more: What to know ahead of the Quad-City Times Bix 7 this weekend
items.summary: What started with just 84 runners in 1975 has grown to thousands of participants. Here's a look at what's in store.

items.headline: Emergency responders extricate man from car at crash site on U. S. Route 150
items.summary: Emergency responders are at the scene of a crash that happened shortly after 6 p.m. Thursday about halfway between Coal Valley and Orion on U. S. Route 150, whi…

items.headline: Scott County taxpayers spent $1.3M on outside jail beds as sheriff urges Iowa prison expansion to ease county costs
items.summary: Scott County spent $1.3 million housing detainees elsewhere in FY2025 as its sheriff called for more Iowa prison space.

items.headline: Nick Gow named Muscatine Parks and Recreation Director
items.summary: Muscatine has a new Parks and Recreation Director. The city has named Nick Gow as the new Parks and Recreation Director, effective July 22. City Administrator M…

items.headline: Chick-fil-A warns cyberattack may have exposed customer data in Iowa, other states
items.summary: Some Chick-fil-A loyalty members may have had their personal information exposed following a recent cyberattack, the company said.

items.headline: Suspect wanted in Henry County, Iowa hit-and-run
items.summary: The suspect's vehicle is believed to be a white Ford Escape. Anyone with information about the driver is asked to contact the Henry County Sheriff's Office.

items.headline: Gov. Pritzker signs bill to honor Emmett Till and his mother
items.summary: Governor JB Pritzker signed House Bill 4323 to designate July 25 as Emmett Till Day in Illinois, honoring the legacy of the young civil rights icon and his moth…

items.headline: Here’s how Illinois election authorities guard against noncitizen voting
items.summary: Officials said safeguards are in place to prevent inadvertent registration.

items.headline: Roadway improvements close part of 12th Street, Rock Island
items.summary: Rock Island has a new roadway improvement project starting next week. A news release from the city’s Public Works Department said 12th Street between 7th Avenue…

items.headline: Pritzker says he doesn’t know details of deadly Jan. 4 shooting by Illinois State Police
items.summary: The governor refers to the unarmed mother who was shot as a "victim," but says he’s otherwise not ready to comment.

items.headline: Davenport family to host 8th annual gun violence prevention walk
items.summary: The public is invited to the walk this Saturday at 10 a.m. from the intersection of 4th and Warren streets to the Davenport police station.

items.headline: Police: Stalking suspect fired at Moline PD during arrest, hit police vehicle
items.summary: A stalking suspect is accused of firing at a Moline police vehicle while fleeing officers on Wednesday. No injuries were reported.
